title: pipeline overhaul ŌĆö cleanup + smoke CI + dashboard observability
description:
## Summary

End-to-end overhaul of the testing pipeline per `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-08-testing-pipeline-overhaul-design.md`.

**What changes:**
- **Cleanup**: removed `tests/local/FA-09-init.sh` (billing-bot stub); CLAUDE.md no longer claims phantom skipped tests.
- **Staleness sunset**: deleted both API endpoints, the DB layer (`StalenessReport` + `saveStalenessReport`/`getLatestStalenessReport`), the `staleness_reports` table (DROP applied to both clusters), the OverviewTab + BerichteTab consumers, the `'staleness'` notification type, and `STALENESS_WEBHOOK_SECRET` from sealed bundles.
- **Per-test schema**: new `test_results` table for flake detection + traceability.
- **Dashboard observability**: three new admin endpoints (`/api/admin/tests/trend`, `/flake`, `/traceability`) + three new components (`TrendChart`, `FlakeMatrix`, `TraceabilityMatrix`) wired into `TestsTab`.
- **CI smoke**: `e2e-smoke` job runs ~15 `@smoke`-tagged Playwright specs against `web.mentolder.de` on every PR (~5-7 min, gated). JUnit reporter + artifact upload + GitHub Checks annotations via `mikepenz/action-junit-report`.
- **Perf**: `tests/runner.sh` now defaults `JOBS=nproc/2` (cap 4) and supports `--fail-fast`.
- **Retention**: daily CronJob prunes `tests/results/` JSON >30d and traces >14d.
- **Inventory**: `task test:inventory` regenerates `website/src/data/test-inventory.json`; CI drift guard fails the PR if it goes stale.

## Test plan

- [x] `task test:all` green (BATS unit + manifests + art-library + Taskfile dry-run)
- [x] `task workspace:validate` clean
- [x] `npx astro check` ŌĆö same 16 pre-existing errors, zero new
- [x] Schema deployed to mentolder + korczewski; `staleness_reports` confirmed dropped, `test_results` confirmed present on both
- [x] Sealed bundles re-encrypted without `STALENESS_WEBHOOK_SECRET`
- [ ] Post-merge: `task feature:website` rebuild ŌĆö endpoints currently still serve old image until website pod rolls
- [ ] Post-merge: visit `/admin/monitoring` ŌåÆ Tests tab to verify TrendChart + FlakeMatrix + TraceabilityMatrix render

## Known notes

- E2 retention CronJob's `app=website` selector targets `workspace` ns; the website actually lives in a separate `website` ns. The CronJob's inner script handles missing pods gracefully (no-ops). If true pruning is needed, follow-up to either move the CronJob into `website` ns or add cross-namespace RBAC.
- Smoke specs target prod (`web.mentolder.de`) and are read-only.
